case_title: DEBS, JEROME H. VS DAMALDI, DAN DBA CRADLE OF TASTE & SON

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-12-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-04-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
CORRESPONDENCE FROM J.DEBS FILED RE:DECISION ON JUDGMENT; COPY OF JUDGMENT FORWARDED TO HIM.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,243.31 FILED BY DEBS, JEROME H. AS TO DEFENDANT DAMALDI, DAN DBA CRADLE OF TASTE & SON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
DEFT. REQUESTED A CONT' TO NOV 14, 94 AT 7:00PM. SENT TO JUDGE FOR SIGNATURE.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF OCT-07-1994, GRANTED
CERT. RECEIPT TO DAN DAMALDI RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-04-1994, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO NOV-14-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEBS, JEROME H. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DAMALDI, DAN DBA CRADLE OF TASTE & SON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAMALDI, DAN DBA CRADLE OF TASTE & SON STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEBS, JEROME H. HEARING SET FOR OCT-07-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
